name_en: Imported cracked leather, color: Orange. Dimensions: 26*13*18
name_cn:
Imported cracked leather, color: Orange. Dimensions: 26*13*18
Paris's latest Neo Cagole motorcycle bag comes with a heart-shaped mirror, a sweet heart hidden under a cool and sharp appearance ♡. Carrying it instantly elevates the whole aura, effortlessly cool. A must-have for sweet hot girls 🧏🏻‍♀️
